Try widening the ATR stop slightly to reduce premature exits during volatility spikes.

```diff
--- a/strategies/crypto.py
+++ b/strategies/crypto.py
@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ class Strategy(_BaseStrategy):
     donchian_n = 20
     exit_n = 10
     atr_n = 14
-    atr_stop = 2.0
+    atr_stop = 2.5
     risk_frac = 0.5

     def init(self):
```
